Description: Affects physical damage dealt by gladiator's arms, marauder's arms, dark knight's arms, gunbreaker's arms, pugilist's arms, lancer's arms, samurai's arms, reaper's arms, thaumaturge's arms, arcanist's arms, red mage's arms, pictomancer's arms, conjurer's arms, astrologian's arms, sage's arms, and blue mage's arms.

Affects physical damage dealt by gladiator's arms, marauder's arms, dark knight's arms, gunbreaker's arms, pugilist's arms, lancer's arms, samurai's arms, reaper's arms, beastmaster's arms, thaumaturge's arms, arcanist's arms, red mage's arms, pictomancer's arms, blue mage's arms, conjurer's arms, astrologian's arms, and sage's arms.
